name: All That Remains
description: '''All That Remains''' is an American [[Heavy metal music|heavy metal]] band from [[Springfield, Massachusetts]], formed in 1998. They have released ten studio albums, a [[All That Remains: Live|live CD and DVD]], and have sold over a million records worldwide. Established by vocalist [[Philip Labonte]], the rest of the band consists of lead guitarist Ken Susi, rhythm guitarist Mike Martin, bassist Matt Deis and drummer Anthony Barone. The band have found varying commercial success over the course of their existence, earning three [[Recording Industry Association of America]] (RIAA) certification awards for their songs and recording six top-ten hits on the American [[Mainstream Rock Tracks|''Billboard'' Mainstream Rock]] chart, including their song "[[Stand Up (All That Remains song)|Stand Up]]" which went #1 in 2012.
